title: V1.4 WS6 — V1.3 Creator Register E2E integration tests (backlog closure)

metadata.description: Close the legacy V1.3 Todo row (formerly 2026-04-17-v1.3-creator-register-e2e-tests). wiremock-driven E2E for creator register -> challenge solve -> verify -> credential store. Happy path + negative paths (bad challenge, verify reject, HTTP 500, challenge expiry, no-credential-leak-on-failure) + idempotency guard (stored-token absence).
metadata.dependency: platform M10 (creator register + verify API reachable in test environment; mocked here via wiremock)
metadata.supersedes: 2026-04-17-v1.3-creator-register-e2e-tests (prior Todo row; this plan is the V1.4 work item that closes it)
commits: 88cd792 test(nexus42): wiremock harness + creator register E2E tests (WS6 T1-T4)
1d3fc78 style(creator-register-e2e): nightly fmt + fix idempotency assertion (WS6 T4)
5d715da fix(creator-register-e2e): add 3 medium-severity QC coverage gaps (WS6 qc-rework)
9b54129 fix(deps): bump rustls-webpki 0.103.12 + rand 0.8.6 for dependabot alerts (#2, #3)
metadata.residual_summary: low/nit items deferred as residuals (no open medium+)
